Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All measured laboratory values are within normal limits for this 84-year-old female patient. There is no evidence of anemia, renal dysfunction, electrolyte imbalance, dyslipidemia, or abnormal glucose metabolism. Urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio is normal, indicating no significant renal protein loss. No acute or chronic laboratory abnormalities detected at this time.
